entries.value: Researching the local topography allows you to decide the terms of the battle. You may choose the mapsheet for this track, from the same map pack as the sheet rolled. If both players roll this result, they must agree on a mapsheet. (AS: You may move 1D6 pieces of terrain up to 1D6” prior to deployment)
Lack of local knowledge has caused issues finding sources of ammunition. Between this track and the next track in this contract, you may not use the rearm SP activity.
Your company finds an opportunity to make use of unused cargo space to trade goods to the locals. Gain +250 SP per Scale in bonus pay at the end of the track.

The XO missed the local wildlife advisory bulletins. Your units are coated in brightly colored, endangered “cuddlepillars” for the duration of the track, and lower the Target Number modifier by 1 for Woods when they are targeted.

Clever analysis of the battlefield allows you to outmaneuver your opponent. You may shift your Home Edge to one of the adjacent edges after the track has edge selection completed, before deployment. If both players roll this result, the Attacker shifts first.

Following a surprise cleanliness inspection, your employer introduces convoluted mandatory maintenance procedures which interfere with actually required maintenance. Once per track, your opponent may reroll a single result on the Determining Critical Hits table.
Communications with your employer bog your forces down. Once during the next track, your opponent may reroll their initiative.

Local guerilla forces opposing your employer rise up to support your opponent. They gain 2 Foot Conv. Infantry platoons per scale. They deploy anywhere on the map at the start of turn 2. For Alpha Strike or Total Warfare infantry rules, use Foot Platoon (Rifle, Ballistic).
Delays in coordinating your orders give your opponent time to scrape up extra support. Your opponent gains 12 BSP (AS: 20PV of vehicles/infantry) per scale for this Track.

Miscommunication between your command and your employer’s command results in a logistics bungle. Your support rights for SP activities between this track and the next are treated as 4 steps lower (minimum of Step 0).

Your employer fails to provide adequate security for your forces, allowing an infiltrator to tamper with your equipment. Your opponent may select one of your ammo bins to empty prior to deployment. (AS: Unit receives a Weapon Hit).
Unexpected Aerospace support is on standby from your employer. You receive 1 additional Strike Battlefield Support selection of your choice, per scale, for this track.
Conflicting orders hamper your actions. Your opponent gains +2 to their initiative rolls for this track.

An accounting error in your employer’s logistics department results in a misdelivered shipment. After the track, in front of your opponent, you may roll on the Purchase table thrice instead of once to determine which ‘mechs are available for purchase.
